detail.name: Connective Select Offset Home Loan
detail.description: For customers who want flexibility to pay down their loan sooner and access additional features such as up to 6 offset accounts.

features.additionalInfo: Up to six 100% Offset Accounts per loan. Full offset if Variable or Fixed. Offsets for Bendigo AFG Home Loans must be in the same customer number as the home loan.
Unlimited additional repayments if variable, Max $20,000 p.a without penalty for fixed loans

eligibility.additionalInfo: Credit and Lending Criteria, Fees and Charges Apply

fees.name: Online Redraw Fee
fees.additionalInfo: Charged when completing a redraw online

fees.name: Manual Redraw Fee
fees.additionalInfo: Payable each time we agree to a redraw request you make otherwise than through Bendigo e-banking

fees.name: Break Cost Fee
fees.additionalInfo:
Payable each time any of the following Break Events occur during a Fixed Rate Period: 
• at your request, we agree to change the Annual Percentage Rate under your Contract; 
• you repay your Loan Account balance in full; or 
• you make an additional repayment (by repaying more than your required repayments 
under your Contract) where the total of all additional repayments you have made 
since the start of the Fixed Rate Period or, if later, the anniversary of that date, that 
exceeds $20,000.00.

fees.name: Discharge Administration Fee
fees.additionalInfo:
Payable: 
each time we provide a partial or full discharge or release of mortgage or security interest in respect of any Mortgaged Property; and 
when you repay your Loan Account balance in full.

fees.name: Default Fee
fees.additionalInfo: Payable each time you are in default. If you are in default because you did not make a repayment when due, the fee will only become payable if the overdue amount is $100 or more. Once payable, the fee continues to be payable every 30 days until you remedy your default.

fees.name: Duplicate Fee
fees.additionalInfo: Payable each time we provide you with a copy of any document we have already provided to you at your request including any statement of account.
